modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Strange links appearing in email messages.

full_description_text: I was checking my email and noticed that the links look really weird. They have this long address with safelinks.protection.outlook.com, and I don't know if it's safe to click on them. It just seems odd, like something is wrong. I just want to make sure my emails are okay and not some kind of trick.
short_description: Strange links appearing in email messages.
description: I was checking my email and noticed that the links look really weird. They have this long address with safelinks.protection.outlook.com, and I don't know if it's safe to click on them. It just seems odd, like something is wrong. I just want to make sure my emails are okay and not some kind of trick.
